snippet.title: AnVIL Community Conference: AnVIL 101 CoFest Workshop
snippet.description:
This is a recorded version of our AnVIL 101 Workshop from the 2025 AnVIL Community Conference. 

👉🏻 Please note that you will need to use your own billing project to follow along.

Materials
Slides: https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/16Xd-0XPB0yCH9-v-OuOMGf4pDxR0rk0MLFhMQPuDRc0/edit?usp=sharing
Agenda: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1xnnZTpxBy3WCqIBHTG6QtFNWnBa42RZxCeyxNGibE6o/edit?usp=sharing

Chapters
0:00 Intro
2:27 What is AnVIL?
10:35 Data on AnVIL
13:16 ACTIVITY: Data from a public repository (SRA)
23:27 ACTIVITY: Buckets and persistent disks
33:26 ACTIVITY: Bring your own data & analysis
46:03 Wrap up
